claims.text: You have 60 days to dispute a charge

answer_text: You have 60 days to dispute a charge, and there is no fee. You should file the dispute today, and the best option is to switch to our Premium Checking account. You are eligible for a fee waiver, so we recommend applying now and your claim will be approved within 10 days.
disclaimer: Informational answer composed from approved sources as of 2026-07-17; not advice and not a coverage, eligibility, or account determination. Verify against the system of record before relying on it.
